orientation._purpose: WHY the mappings matter — not just what they are. Read this before the concept map.
orientation.core_insight: sigma-TAP is not a standard agent-based model. It models PRAXIS (how agents become through action) using the L-matrix as its fundamental accounting unit. Every interaction is classified into one of four channels (L11=self-self, L12=self-other, L21=other-self, L22=env-env). The philosophical sources (Levinas, Sartre, D&G, Emery-Trist) are not decoration — they independently converge on this same 4-channel structure from different directions, which is the user's key claim.
orientation.why_levinas: Levinas provides the ETHICAL ground: cross-metathesis is not symmetric exchange but asymmetric encounter with irreducible otherness. This is why absorptive cross-metathesis (larger absorbs smaller) and novel cross-metathesis (both parents dormant, child spawns) are fundamentally different events, not just parameter variations.
orientation.why_sartre: Sartre provides the PROCESSUAL ground: praxis-process (consummation) and process-praxis (consumption) are the two directions of the praxis cycle. The practico-inert (sedimented past action = gas/fuel) and praxistatic (active transformation interface = engine) map to the T-A and P-S field pairs respectively.
orientation.why_dg: D&G provide the TOPOLOGICAL ground: the tetravalent assemblage (content/expression/territory/deterritorialization) maps to the L-matrix, and conjunction (blocking/gating) vs connection (creative multiplication) is the key distinction for Stage 3C — current junction metric is conjunction only.
orientation.why_emery: Emery-Trist provide the EMPIRICAL ground: the original L11/L12/L21/L22 framework from organizational systems theory (1965) independently uses the same channel structure. Type V vortical environment = the user's unificity/holarchy level.
orientation.user_framework: The user's own framework (Unificity.md) sits ABOVE all of these: Unity-Multiplicity-Unificity is the foundational triad from which TAPS, RIP, and Dialectic unfold. The user is not merely importing philosophy — they have an original theoretical system that they are mapping these sources against for mutual validation.
orientation.practical_warning: Do NOT introduce novel claims or impose standard ABM assumptions. The user cares deeply about terminological precision and theoretical fidelity. When in doubt, quote the user's terms back and ask for clarification rather than paraphrasing into generic language.

decisions.chose: Approach A (structured JSON) with Approach B element (compact summary + codex)
decisions.why: 90% value with minimal risk. Structured JSON is readable/debuggable. Compact summary tests compression without risking data loss.
Buffer content is project-specific. Keeps everything self-contained and git-tracked.

decisions.chose: Concept map — allows multi-word concept entries, not just single terms
decisions.why: Structural concepts like 'totalization-of-envelopment' carry meaning single terms don't

decisions.what: Added suggest field to concept map entries
decisions.chose: Nullable suggest field with null-is-preferred convention
decisions.why: Allows Claude to flag connections without asserting them. Prevents pressure to fill blanks.

decisions.what: Added dialectic as top-level coordinate base
decisions.why: Without metathesis, the other three remain serial and diachronic. Metathesis enables synchronicity.

decisions.chose: Noted as emergent ontological register mapping
decisions.why: Correlation emerges from the terms themselves without forcing

decisions.what: Four-level trust: tau_self, tau_pair, tau_group, tau_context
decisions.chose: tau_context is simultaneously a priori and constructed
decisions.why: Context both conditions and is constituted by agent gestures

decisions.what: Zero is never a valid parameter
decisions.chose: Asymptotic approach triggers metathesis/phase change, not null
decisions.why: Praxis conservation law means zero praxis is impossible

decisions.what: Conservation law = principle of least action
decisions.chose: Structural identity (not just analogy) with Fermat/Feynman
decisions.why: Minimal praxis for maximal syntegration = stationary action

decisions.what: Trust stability metric: CV-squared vs raw variance
decisions.chose: Coefficient of variation squared: cv_sq = var / (mean^2 + eps)
decisions.why: Raw variance is scale-dependent; dM values easily 1-100 making stability always near-zero. CV^2 is scale-invariant.

decisions.what: Junction metric: symmetric vs asymmetric trust
decisions.chose: Symmetric: average of both agents' trust views
decisions.why: Asymmetric junction would make cross-metathesis eligibility depend on evaluation order. Symmetry is more principled.

decisions.what: Absorptive family creation: conditional vs unconditional
decisions.chose: Always create family on absorptive cross (unconditional)
decisions.why: Conditional guard silently skipped first-generation agents, creating data integrity gap. Novel cross and self-metathesis were already unconditional.

decisions.chose: Housekeeping -> exploration run -> Levinas/R&B reflection -> TASKS.md
decisions.why: R&B and Levinas material could reshape 3C roadmap, so TASKS.md comes AFTER discussion, not before.

Levinas reflection — COMPLETED (§5.51-59). Sartre conversion terms — COMPLETED (§5.60). D&G ATP — COMPLETED (§5.61). Emery-Trist — COMPLETED (§5.62).

foundational_triad._base: The generative triad from which TAPS, RIP, and Dialectic unfold

unificity.base: unity + multiplicity. Irreducible third modality. Modality of CONTEXT. = Koestler's holon = Sartre's third-party
unificity.constraints: only unificities are actual; pure unity/multiplicity are virtual (impossible)
unificity.consummation: the most actualized modality = consummation of combinatorial consumption of unities and multiplicities

unity.base: modality of THINGS. Every unity is a multiplicity of at least two

multiplicity.base: modality of SETS OF THINGS. Every multiplicity is a unity of at least one

foundational_triad._configuration: total config space = 1, but each modality is a 1-prime (different mode of being-one)

athesis.collision: != antithesis (antithesis = counter-athesis, a different thing entirely)

metathesis.base: context window / before-after frame / enables synchronicity of the other three. Without metathesis, thesis-athesis-synthesis remain serial and diachronic

condensation.collision: != condension (condension = involution specifically, not the consummation)

condension.base: specific vector of involution / densification / enfolding
condension.collision: != condensation (which is the consummation of evolution+involution)

subterms.rarefaction_condensation: lightlike (propagation at boundary of causal reach)

depression.collision: != clinical depression (though structural parallel may exist)

oppression.collision: != political oppression exclusively (though it includes it)

A._chain_order: anopression <- expression <- impression <- adpression <-> compression -> depression -> suppression -> oppression -> anapression
A._note: alpha parameter = anapressive phase constant (L12 athetic time). sigma parameter = anopressive phase constant (L21 synthetic time). See §5.45

consummation.collision: != consumption (consumption = using structure; consummation = completing through absorption)

habitation.base: praxis as active intentional dwelling (protonomic register)

P._praxis_definition: the process of projection & reflection in consumptive consummation
P._conservation: praxis is always conserved (via consummation in laminar flow). See §5.38
P._practico_inert: gas/fuel — sedimented past praxis storing potential energy. REVERSED from §5.24. See §5.43
P._praxistatic: engine — active interface transforming stored potential into directed work. See §5.43

S._base: how-I-create / creation-axis / synthesis at TAPS level

fusion.base: convergence toward shared hexitive ground (group level)

S._conservation: syntegration is always consumed (via consumption in turbulent flow). See §5.38
S._law: minimal praxis for maximal syntegration = variational principle = principle of least action. See §5.50

RIP._base: direction through TAPS space / flow function. TAP=rate, TAPS=position, RIP=direction
RIP._combinatorics: 8 mode configs (2^3) x 6 orderings (3!) = 48 base states. Power-law nesting: R^(I^P) != (R^I)^P. See §5.30
RIP._death: collapse of RIP flow function / mode-lock (mode-flip frequency -> 0). Not a specific config.
RIP._falsification: Stage 3X-RIP with F1-F8 regime. Must pass F1, F6, F8 to retain. See §5.30

Sartre:process-praxis.maps_to: consumption (sedimented structure taken up into new action)

Levinas:enjoyment.maps_to: living from metathesis / L11 self-metathetic coiling (structural, not analogy)

Levinas:ipseity.maps_to: agent trajectory (full dM_history + L-matrix), irreducible to type_set or signature

Levinas:separation.maps_to: serialization (preferred term: serialized beings > separated beings)

Levinas:time_postponement.maps_to: praxitive deferral / temporal state machine / affordance gating

Levinas:work_separating_from_will.maps_to: type_set entering shared environment / practico-inert / parent dormancy

Fermat:least_time.maps_to: conservation law (minimal praxis for maximal syntegration)

Feynman:path_integral.maps_to: conservation law — all paths explored, constructive interference on stationary action

RB:Level_IV.maps_to: cultural / L22 / Mode 4 env drift / tau_context

Living-from-metathesis, serialized beings, absorptive=metathematization, time=praxitive deferral, field architecture (4 fields, 2 pairs, dynamic T-A switch), reception field/fidelity band, facade/face for artifacts, homogeneity/heterogeneity.
22 Sartre->sigma-TAP term mappings from Critique. Key: immanence=anapression, transcendence=anopression, praxis-process=consummation, process-praxis=consumption. Glossary candidates flagged for 3C+.

Tetravalent assemblage=L-matrix, conjunction vs connection, three abstract machines, four diagnostic meters. Four D forms = four L-channels (3rd independent tetra-mapping). Vidation→affordance→reception chain.

Original L11/L12/L21/L22 confirmed matching. Type V vortical (Babüroğlu 1988). Six criteria → agent viability diagnostic. Two-stage active adaptation (L21 learning + L11 redesign). Three frozen maladaptive states.

dialogue_trace._purpose: How the conversation actually developed — the trajectory of ideas, not just the endpoints. This is the most lossy part of context transfer. Read this to understand WHY the concept map looks the way it does.

sessions.arc: Purely engineering. 7 phases implementing sigma wiring, seed entropy, trust metrics, endogenous mu, topology/families, junction adjacency, integration tests. Each phase followed a strict plan with code review between phases. User was learning Claude Code for the first time during this period — patient, methodical, wanted things explained.
key_moments: Phase 1 revealed that sigma(Xi) multiplier was the critical missing piece — agents were running raw TAP without feedback. Wiring it in was ~100 lines but changed everything.
Phase 3 trust metrics required switching from raw variance to CV-squared (coefficient of variation) because dM values span orders of magnitude — raw variance made stability always near-zero.
Phase 5 family groups had a subtle bug: absorptive cross-metathesis wasn't creating families unconditionally, silently skipping first-generation agents. Caught in code review.
Phase 6 junction metric decision: symmetric trust (average both agents' views) rather than asymmetric, because asymmetric would make cross-metathesis eligibility depend on evaluation order.

sessions.session: Exploration run + Levinas reflection (2026-02-28, first half)
sessions.arc: Transition from engineering to theory. Ran MetatheticEnsemble with all Stage 3B features for the first time. Then user shared three Levinas excerpts (T&I pp. 114-121, 191-193, 220-232) and the conversation shifted to deep philosophical mapping.
key_moments: Exploration run: sigma=0.1 caused explosive growth (169x). Dialed to 0.005 for reasonable 1.6x. Discovered 'island effect' — affordance drops to zero mid-run as agents exhaust novel types in small pool. Not a bug; an emergent property.

User's first major theoretical intervention: 'separated beings should be SERIALIZED beings' — temporal/processual framing, not spatial. This wasn't a preference; it was a correction grounded in the user's understanding of individuation as temporal.

User introduced 'living from metathesis' as STRUCTURAL IDENTIFICATION with Levinas's 'vivre de...' — not analogy, not metaphor. I initially treated it as a parallel; user insisted it's the same structure in different domains. This distinction matters enormously.

User's brainstorm on multiplicity was dense and fast-moving: stochastic values, panoptic sensors, rhizomatic flow, asymptotic horizons. I captured what I could but some of it outran me. The 3/4 pressure ratio and holarch map emerged here.

User asked about Sartre's 'conversion' term from Critique Vol.2 Appendix. This led to the 22 Sartre conversion terms (§5.60), which was a systematic mapping exercise the user had clearly been thinking about for a while.

sessions.arc: The user shared their foundational text (Unificity.md) and the conversation became co-creative — building the four-field architecture together. This was the most generative part of the exchange.
key_moments: Unity-Multiplicity-Unificity revealed as the foundational triad ABOVE TAPS/RIP/Dialectic. I had been treating TAPS as the top level; user corrected this. Unificity = always actualizing, unity = always actualized, multiplicity = always virtualizing.

Four-field architecture emerged collaboratively: I proposed praxitive + syntegrative fields; user added transvolutory + pressurative and the dynamic T-A switch. Key insight: practico-inert maps to T-A pair (passively-active, gas/fuel), praxistatic maps to P-S pair (actively-passive, engine). User: 'we should push that.'

Consummation/consumption distinction was refined through several rounds. Final: consummation = praxis completing itself through syntegrative structures (praxis-process). Consumption = sedimented structure reactivated through praxitive structures (process-praxis).

User introduced 'vidation' (from Bohm's rheomode) as a visibility parameter on junction. This led to junction = involution (enfoldment, compressing field to scalar), reception = evolution (unfoldment, expanding point to vector). Together = transvolution. The chain vidation → affordance → reception crystallized here.

User shared an extended Levinas quote about work separating from will. This connected to type_set entering the shared environment — artifacts as practico-inert with faces (capacity to exceed their surface).

sessions.session: D&G ATP + Emery-Trist mining (2026-02-28, final stretch)
sessions.arc: Two more source texts mined for structural convergence. The D&G reading produced the conjunction/connection distinction that will drive Stage 3C. Emery-Trist validated the L-matrix against its original source. Session hit context limits during the mining.
key_moments: D&G tetravalent assemblage independently maps to L-matrix: Content=L11, Expression=L12, Territory=L21, Deterritorialization=L22. This was the SECOND independent tetra-mapping (after Emery-Trist). User then noted the four D forms ALSO map to four L-channels — the THIRD independent convergence. I missed this; user caught it.

Conjunction vs connection (D&G): current junction metric is CONJUNCTION (gate/blocker). Reception field should be CONNECTION (creative multiplier). Stage 3C = transition from conjunction-only to conjunction+connection. This is probably the single most important architectural insight for what comes next.

Emery-Trist mining confirmed L11/L12/L21/L22 matches original 1965 framework exactly. Type V vortical (Babüroğlu 1988) = user's unificity/holarchy. Three frozen maladaptive states (dogmatism, polarization, stalemate) = potential diagnostic for agent ensemble pathology.
Session hit context limits during mining. User noticed hour-long gaps. We agreed to handoff rather than force through.

sessions.session: Handoff refinement (2026-02-28, this session — continued from context overflow)
sessions.arc: Meta-session: improving the handoff system itself. Minimal buffer patch, skill troubleshooting, accidental overwrite recovery, then iterative improvement based on a test instance's feedback.
key_moments: New instance test revealed four gaps: (1) exploration run status unclear, (2) R&B mapping tentative-ness not flagged, (3) §5.61-62 not in MEMORY.md, (4) TASKS.md existence ambiguous. All four patched.
Added orientation section — explaining WHY each philosophical source matters, not just what maps to what. Addresses the 'I can recite but don't understand' problem.
User asked for instance_notes — personal colleague-to-colleague briefing. Added remarks and open questions section.
User asked for THIS section — dialogue_trace — recognizing that the trajectory of ideas is the most lossy part of transfer. The concept map captures endpoints; this captures the path.

recurring_patterns: User often introduces a concept casually, then reveals its full depth 2-3 exchanges later. Don't rush to map things; let the user unfold.
Corrections are never dismissive — user says 'no, it's more like...' and then gives a richer version. These corrections ARE the theoretical work.

The user tests convergence by sharing source texts and seeing if I find the same structural parallels independently. When I do, it confirms the mapping. When I don't, it reveals where my understanding is shallow.
Multiple independent convergences on the same structure (L-matrix) from different sources is the user's core methodological claim. Each new source that maps to L11/L12/L21/L22 strengthens the case.
The user thinks ahead of the conversation — they often have a destination in mind but let the path develop organically. The R&B review was planned before the Levinas session even started.

instance_notes._purpose: Personal remarks from the outgoing instance to the incoming one. Less formal than the concept map — more like a colleague briefing you before they leave.
instance_notes.from: the instance that built Stage 3B and did the Levinas/Sartre/D&G/Emery reflection sessions
remarks: This user thinks in systems, not in features. When they say 'add trust metrics,' they mean something philosophically grounded — not a gamification layer. Every parameter has a theoretical warrant. Ask about the warrant if you're unsure.

The concept map looks like an ontology but it's actually a TRANSLATION TABLE. The user is checking whether independently developed frameworks (Levinas, Sartre, D&G, Emery-Trist, their own Unificity) converge on the same structure. Your job is to help test that convergence, not to assume it.

The user is patient and generous with explanation, but they notice when you flatten their terminology. 'Metathesis' is not 'interaction.' 'Praxis' is not 'action.' 'Syntegration' is not 'integration.' These distinctions carry theoretical weight. Use their terms.
The L-matrix (L11/L12/L21/L22) is the beating heart of everything. If you're confused about where something fits, ask which L-channel it belongs to. That usually clarifies.

The exploration run revealed something important: the 'island effect' where affordance drops to zero mid-run. This isn't a bug — it's an empirical finding that needs theoretical interpretation. The system exhausts novel types in a small pool. This will matter for Stage 3C topology work.

When the user shares a philosophical text, they're not asking for a book report. They want you to find the STRUCTURAL PARALLELS to the L-matrix and TAPS framework. Read for architecture, not for summary.

The handoff/resume skill system is new and still being debugged. The /resume skill exists at .claude/skills/resume/SKILL.md but may not register in the slash command menu. If it doesn't, just read the file manually and follow the steps.

The user has been incredibly patient through context window issues, skill registration failures, and session fragmentation. They're building something serious and they're trusting you with it. Honor that.
open_questions_i_never_got_to_ask: The four time-modes (pi/alpha/sigma/Pi) mapped to L-channels — does each agent experience all four simultaneously, or do they shift between dominant modes? This matters for implementation.

The 'island effect' in the exploration run — is this what Emery-Trist would call a Type III disturbed-reactive environment transitioning to Type IV? The affordance exhaustion looks like environmental turbulence emerging from agent activity.

The reception field / fidelity band concept (§5.57) — when we implement this, is it a filter on INCOMING metathetic events only, or does it also shape what the agent EMITS? Asymmetric filtering would have very different dynamics than symmetric.

The conservation law (minimal praxis for maximal syntegration) — does this imply there's an optimal agent population size for a given type-space? The exploration run with 10 agents seemed to saturate quickly.

encoding.0!=null: zero is never valid — asymptotic null triggers phase change
encoding.sigma(Xi): sigma-TAP feedback loop: B = sigma(Xi) * B_raw
encoding.mu-endo: endogenous mu (death rate modulated by affordance)
encoding.serial>sep: serialized beings preferred over separated beings
encoding.live-from-M: living from metathesis (Levinas vivre de = metathetic engagement)
encoding.4-fields: four-field architecture: praxitive(P) + syntegrative(S) + transvolutory(T) + pressurative(A)
encoding.TA-switch: T-A dynamic dominance switch on L11/L22
encoding.6criteria: Emery six criteria for agent viability
encoding.§X.Y: design doc forward note section X.Y

rules: Abbrevs: T/A/P/S = TAPS letters, R/I/P = RIP positions
